name: Drift
description: Drift conversational marketing and sales platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Drift
2. Settings → App Settings → Drift App
3. Generate an access token
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Drift → Settings → App Settings → Access Token
